content.en:
Rumble!!!

The ancestral monument shook, and a portal appeared above.

This portal is the entrance to the ancestral monument space, this portal is between illusion and reality, unless it is the power of the true ancestor, it cannot be touched at all.

Some earth deities who didn't know about the ancestral monument space tried to enter the portal, but they passed through the portal, and they didn't enter the ancestral monument space at all, but seemed to pass through the air.

At the beginning, a god general explained: "It's useless, only the top 100 god generals can enter the ancestral monument space through the portal, for others, the ancestral monument space does not exist at all!"

Some Dizun thought that this was a chance, but after learning the truth, they were immediately disappointed one by one.

Whoa!!

The top 100 gods and generals on the list have arrived one by one, and each of them has been admired and envied by countless gods, and naturally there are people who are jealous.

After a while, the Yunzi Divine Maiden came, causing a sensation.

Compared with the beginning, the strength of the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden has skyrocketed, and it has reached the mid-stage combat power of the Seven Stars, ranking 32nd on the list of divine generals.

Most of the seven-star god generals are seven-star early stage god generals, and the gap between the early stage of the seven stars and the middle stage of the seven stars is very large, like Ye Tian is only a first-stage seven-star god general, so the ranking is not high, but in fact, his combat power is more than this ranking.

Although the Yunzi Priestess is ranked 32nd, she is the ancestor of the Dao Ancestor, and she must have the hole cards, even the top 20 gods and generals on the list of gods and generals dare not ignore the Yunzi Goddess.

The gods who really understand the Dao Ancestor's personal lineage don't dare to offend or challenge a Dao Ancestor's personal lineage, such as the Heavy Bone God General, who has no big backing, is really stupid to challenge Ye Tian.

There is no way, the Canglang Sea, where the Heavy Bone God General is located, is just an ordinary big force, there is only one Dao Ancestor, and it is not too powerful True Ancestor, where do you know the horror of the Dao Ancestor-level forces' personal disciples.

Not long after the arrival of the Yunzi Divine Maiden, Ye Tian also came.

At this moment, the Yun Zi Divine Maiden's gaze looked at Ye Tian, as if she wanted to see Ye Tian through.

But she can't see through Ye Tian, and Ye Tian can't see through the Yunzi Goddess, he only knows the talent of the Yunzi Goddess, but the situation of a person's talent is not a big secret, the supernatural powers, hole cards and treasures cultivated are the real secrets.

"I'm afraid I'm far from her match now!"

Ye Tian said very consciously.

After all, the Yunzi Divine Daughter is also the ancestor of the Dao, and it is the real ancestor of the Dao, and she has been taught by the ancestor of the Dao, and the hole cards of the body are not something he can imagine.

Moreover, the Yunzi Goddess has been a Dao Ancestor for a long time, so it is naturally not simple.

Ye Tian knew his details, although it was also passed down by the Dao Ancestor, but because he was in the big universe, he couldn't enjoy a lot of treatment!

Moreover, he was able to become the Dao Ancestor's personal inheritance, all thanks to the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden's god-level extreme transcendence talent.

Strictly speaking, the Yunzi Divine Maiden invisibly created him.

"Wanfa Daozi, hello!"

The Yunzi Divine Maiden took the initiative to greet her.

"Yun Zi Divine Maiden is polite!"

Ye Tian smiled slightly and said.

"Wanfa Daozi, it is said that you have been promoted from the middle stage of the six-star to the peak of the six-star in an instant, and then to the early stage of the seven-star stage in a short time, I don't know how to do it?" The Yun Zi Divine Maiden's eyes flashed with purple light, and she said in an extremely soft tone.

In an instant, Ye Tian felt a shock in his soul, and the whole person seemed to be about to tell the secret.

But he quickly came to his senses and hurriedly said: "It's no secret, it's just a high talent!"

But in his heart, he was shocked.

Yun Zi Divine Maiden estimated that she had cast some kind of enchanting power just now, if it weren't for his cultivation of the Void Heaven Dao Body and the transformation of his soul, it was estimated that he would not be able to stop this enchanting supernatural power, although he didn't know that he was completely charmed, but he couldn't help but tell his secret, it would be terrible.

Yun Zi Divine Maiden saw that her charm magic power was invalid, and she didn't care, in her opinion, this is very normal, if it is successful, it means that Ye Tian's Dao is too spicy.

The two just had a preliminary confrontation, and it was not a big feud.

Although Ye Tian was a little annoyed, he didn't care about it immediately, people were just testing themselves, if they were really annoyed and angry, their mood would be too low.

If his strength far surpasses that of the Yunzi Divine Maiden, he might as well teach the Yunzi Divine Maiden a lesson, but his current strength is indeed inferior to the Yunzi Divine Maiden, so he will not be abused.

"Wanfa Daozi, I'll go in first, if I have a chance in the future, I can have a good exchange!"

After the Yunzi Divine Maiden finished speaking, she flew into the ancestral monument space.

Ye Tian smiled slightly, and immediately flew in.

The ancestral monument space seems to be boundless, but in fact it is not very large.

But the vitality here is too strong, endless vitality, endless rules, endless perceptions......

None of this is legend, it's true.

After Ye Tian entered here, he immediately felt that his body was jumping, which showed what a treasure this place was.

The ancestral monument space is divided into small spaces, and only one person is allowed to enter each small space, once someone enters this small space, others will not be able to break in.

In this way, you should avoid being disturbed, otherwise you may lose all your efforts once you are disturbed during the process of meditation and cultivation.

According to the legend, the ancestral monument space only opens for a thousand years at a time, and you can't use your time talent here, so you can only follow the time here.

After a thousand years, the ancestral monument space will be closed, and everyone will be kicked out, this is the rule of the ancestral monument space, and no one can violate it.

The Yunzi Divine Maiden chose a small space, and after entering it, she could participate in enlightenment and cultivation.

Ye Tian also chose a small space at random, and stayed away from the Yunzi Goddess, so as not to let his secrets be snooped on by the Yunzi Goddess.

After entering the small space, Ye Tian was dedicated to three purposes, a small part of his mind comprehended the Xuan Xuan Void Technique, a small part of his mind cultivated the Void Heaven Dao Body, and the other part comprehended the Time and Space Dao, trying to condense the prototype of the Time and Space Dao.

Rumble!!!!

Endless insights enveloped Ye Tian, and endless vitality poured into his body, helping him refine his body and refine the Void Heaven Dao Body.

In such an environment, Ye Tian made too fast progress.

Originally, according to Ye Tian's estimate, if he wanted to condense the prototype of the Great Dao of Time and Space, it would take at least 100,000 years, but now Ye Tian felt that he could completely condense the prototype of the Great Dao of Time and Space within a few hundred years, and cast the first supreme foundation for his Endless Dao.

Moreover, he even hoped that during this time in the ancestral monument space, two patterns would be inscribed.
